---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you're proposing -->

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- What problem does this solve? What need or use case drives this request? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. How should it work? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? -->

## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an "x" -->

- [ ] ✨ New feature (adds functionality)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / technical improvement
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration / DevOps

## Screenshots / Mockups
<!-- If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or examples from other products -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other context, links, or references that support this request -->

## Checklist
<!-- Ensure all items are completed before submitting -->

- [ ] I have searched for existing issues or discussions before submitting
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem this feature would solve
- [ ] I am willing to contribute to the implementation of this feature
